description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a space gray metallic finish and a minimalist design. The lid features a prominent, glossy black Apple logo centered on the back, indicating it is a MacBook. The keyboard is backlit and features a standard QWERTY layout with a Touch Bar above the function row, and a large trackpad below the keyboard. The display is thin and wide, showing a macOS desktop with a scenic island wallpaper, and the bezels around the screen are slim. The chassis appears to be made primarily of aluminum, with plastic and glass components for the screen and keys. The overall build is compact and lightweight, suitable for portable use in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public spaces.
description: A space gray MacBook laptop with a backlit keyboard, large trackpad, and a glossy Apple logo on the lid. The screen displays a macOS desktop with a scenic wallpaper.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the thin profile, keyboard, and partially open screen.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth metallic lid and centered Apple logo.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the slim chassis and open screen.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full keyboard, large trackpad, and the active display with macOS interface.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is centered on the back of the lid, shaped as a stylized apple with a bite taken out of the right side.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a macOS desktop with a scenic island wallpaper and visible application icons.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row replaced by a Touch Bar, no numeric keypad, and a large trackpad below the keyboard.
